text: Moon light - a ray that shoots from the top to the bottom of the entity.
Moon dripstone - pierces the nearest target with a stalagmite, dealing critical damage to the enemy.
Moon withering - gives a wither effect to all entities within a 5 block radius.
Full Moon: During full moon — +50% damage; 10% chance to apply "Slowness III" for 6 sec.
New Moon: During non-full phases — +10% damage; 10% reflected damage when hit.
